data.body:
When I was a kid (11ish), mom had a Harlequin romance novel phase. I was a voracious reader but not allowed to read those because "they had naughty words" and she'd find out if I did.

I peeked once and saw a new word, then immediately put it back & got scared that she'd find out I learned "pizazz".
